hero.title: Upload Your Own Dance Video
hero.titleHighlight: AI Creates Custom Dance Videos from Photos
hero.description: Upload a photo and a reference video. Our AI transfers the exact movements to the person in your photo. No editing skills needed.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions required. Pay per use or save with packs.

step1.title: Upload Photo
step1.desc: Any photo with a person. Selfie, portrait, full body — all work.

step2.title: Pick a Motion
step2.desc: Upload a reference video or choose from our preset library.

step3.title: Download Video
step3.desc: AI generates your video in minutes. Download and share anywhere.

examples.title: See It In Action
examples.subtitle: Static photo → AI-animated video. Real results, no editing.

items.a: Most videos are ready in 5-15 minutes depending on length.
JPG, PNG, WebP. The photo should clearly show a person.
Up to 30 seconds. Longer videos cost more credits.
Yes! All generated videos are yours to use however you want.

Yes. All uploaded content is automatically screened by our AI content moderation system. NSFW, sexually explicit, violent, or otherwise inappropriate content is rejected. Accounts that repeatedly violate our content policy may be suspended.

items.q: Can I use my own dance video as reference?
items.a: Yes! Upload any dance video and our AI will transfer those exact movements to your photo.
MP4, MOV, WebM. Most common video formats work.
You'll get your credits back automatically. We also send you an email with details.
Yes, within 7 days if you haven't used any credits. Contact support@animaker.dev
Not currently, but our Single plan is only $1.99 to try it out.
You do. You have full commercial rights to all videos you generate.

items.q: Is this suitable for Instagram Reels?
items.a: Yes! Our 9:16 aspect ratio is perfect for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

items.q: Can I use it for YouTube videos?
items.a: Absolutely. Generated videos work great for YouTube content.

items.q: How to make photo dance for TikTok?
items.a: Upload your photo, pick a dance video, and we'll generate a TikTok-ready 9:16 video in minutes.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to start creating amazing videos
login.termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

dashboard.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! Credits added to your account.

create.title: Create New Video
create.subtitle: Upload a photo and a reference dance video

alerts.videoTooLong: Video must be 30 seconds or shorter
alerts.checkoutUnavailable: Unable to start checkout for this account
alerts.missingFiles: Please upload both a photo and a video

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing and using Animaker.AI, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.body: Animaker.AI provides AI-powered video generation services that transfer motion from reference videos to user-uploaded photos. The service is provided on a pay-per-use basis.

responsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
items: Only upload content you own or have permission to use
Not upload illegal, harmful, or inappropriate content
Not use the service for fraudulent purposes
Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

moderation.title: 4. Content Moderation
moderation.body: Our AI video generation service is powered by RunningHub API, which includes built-in content moderation and NSFW filtering. We do not allow generation of inappropriate, harmful, or illegal content. Violations may result in account suspension.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.body: You retain all rights to your uploaded content and generated videos. You grant us a limited license to process your content for service delivery. Generated videos are yours to use commercially or personally.

payments.title: 6. Payment and Refunds
payments.body: All payments are processed securely through Creem. Refunds are available within 24 hours if the video generation fails due to technical issues on our end.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: We provide the service as is without warranties. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

disputes.title: 8. Dispute Resolution
disputes.intro: Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of the service shall be resolved through:
items: Good faith negotiation between parties
If unresolved, binding arbitration under applicable law
Governing law: Laws of the jurisdiction where the service is operated

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact:

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.intro: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
items: Account information (email, name)
Photos and videos you upload for processing
Payment information (processed securely by our payment provider)
Usage data and analytics

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Provide and improve our AI video generation service
Process your payments and manage your account
Send service-related communications
Analyze usage patterns to enhance user experience

storage.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
storage.body: Your uploaded photos and generated videos are stored securely on our servers. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. Generated videos are automatically deleted after 30 days unless you choose to save them.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
items: Payment processing (Creem)
AI video generation (RunningHub API with built-in content moderation)
Cloud storage (Cloudflare R2)
Analytics

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
items: Access your personal data
Request deletion of your data
Opt out of marketing communications
Export your generated videos

contact.title: 6. Contact Us
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, contact us at:
